{"vault/seal/seal.go": ["  > 160:type SealInfo struct {
... 161:	wrapping.Wrapper
... 162:	Priority int

... 165:	// sealConfigType is the KMS.Type of this wrapper. It is a string rather than a SealConfigType

... 167:	SealConfigType string
... 168:
... 169:	// Disabled indicates, when true indicates that this wrapper should only be used for decryption.
... 170:	Disabled bool
... 171:
... 172:	HcLock          sync.RWMutex
... 173:	LastHealthCheck time.Time
... 174:	LastSeenHealthy time.Time
... 175:	Healthy         bool
... 176:}
... 177:
... 178:func (si *SealInfo) keyId(ctx context.Context) string {

... 180:		return id"]}

input.needle: // GetEnabledSealInfoByPriority returns the SealInfo for the enabled seal wrappers.
input.repl: // GetEnabledSealInfoByPriority returns the SealWrapper for the enabled seal wrappers.

input.needle: // AllSealsHealthy returns whether all enabled SealInfos are currently healthy.
input.repl: // AllSealsHealthy returns whether all enabled SealWrappers are currently healthy.
